top_signals.title: Yen Defies Record Intervention as Wait for BOJ Hike Raises Risks
top_signals.summary: Yen traders face a heightened risk of intervention over the next two weeks after Japan’s currency defied historic attempts to prop it up.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Weak Monsoon Forecast Adds to India’s Inflation, Growth Worries
top_signals.summary: The biggest risk is to rural consumption, a key driver of economic growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Africa CDC says over 1,100 suspected Ebola cases in Congo and Uganda
top_signals.summary: The organization's director general said there were 263 confirmed cases in both countries as of Saturday, with 43 confirmed deaths.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
